name: ASUS PRO H810M-CT-CSM Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 4.0 x1 - Support DDR5-6400 - 1x M.2 Slot - USB 10Gbps Type-A - HDMI 2.1 - 2x DisplayPort 1.4 - Intel Gigabit LAN
